raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Raß jaw bijis irr/tas wehl
buhs/ un kas jaw darrihts irr/
tas taps wehl darrihts/ un ne
kahda jauna Leeta irr appakſch
Saules.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Irrag kahda Leeta/ no ka
fazzijt warretu? Rangi/ tchi irr
jauna. Tas irr jaw bijis preek-
schajôß Laikôß/ kas preekſch
mums bijuschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Taks pagahjuſchas Lee-
tas ne tohp atgahdatas: Ir tahs
nahkamas/ kas wehl buhs/ ne
taps peeminnetas pee teem/ kas
pehz buhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Es tas Mahzitajs/ bju
Kehniſsch pahr Israëlu Jeru-
saleme.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "13. Un apnehmoß fawa Sir-
di Gudribu mekleht/ un baud iht
wiſſu/ kas appakſch Debbes no-
teek. Scho gruhtu Darbochann
irr Deews teem Zilweku Behr-
neem uslizzis/ ka eekſch tahdeem
buhs wahrdſinatees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "14. Es usluhkoju wiſſus Dar-
bus/ kas appakſch Saules no-
teek/ un rangi/ wiſſ bija Nelee-
tiba un Sir ds-Wahrgofchana.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "15. To Lihku ne warr lihdse-
nu darriht/ un kas truhkfst/to ne
warr fkaitiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "16. Es runnaju fawa Sir di/
un fazziju : Rangi / es efimu
augſis tappis/ un eekſch Gudri-
bas veenehmis wairak neka wiſ-
ſi/ kas preekſch inannim Jerusa-
lemê irr biuſchi/ un manna
Sir ds irr dauds Gudribas un
Sinnatchanas redſejſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Un es apnehmoß fawa
Sir di atſiht Gudribu un Sin-
natchannu/ Trakfumu und Gef-
kidu. (Bet) es fainantju ir to
effam Sir ds-Wahrgofchannu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Jo kur dauds Gudribas
irr/ tur irr dauds Geuhtibas/un
jo wairak Sinnatchanas/ jo wai-
rak Behdu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta II. Nodalla.
Salamans aprakſta joprobjam tahs zilwezigas
Darriſchanas Neleetibu : 1 / 24. Pehz mahza
wiſſch/ to wiſſu labbafu eſſam/ kad tas Zil-
weks to/ ko tam Deewß no jawahm Rai-
fahm un Darbeem dohd/ ar Preeku walka/
tatschu tas arri Neleetiba irraid : 24.
1. S fazziju uhs fawu
Sir di: Nu tad / es
pahrbaudifchu tewi
Breezikâ/ ka es redſeht warnu
kas labs irr / bet rangi / ir tas
bija Neleetiba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "2. Uhs to Smeeschanu fazziju
es: Tu eſſi trakfa; Un uhs to
Preezibu: Ko tu darri?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "3. Tad es apnehmoß fawa
Sir di mannu Meeſu ar Wihut
meeloht/ un ka manna Sir ds tik
labbi us Gudribu dohtohß/ ka
arri to Gefkibu bauditu/ tee-
kams es redsetu/ kurſch to Zilwe-
ku Behrnu Labbums buhtu/kas
tecin bij jadarra appakſch Deb-
beſim fawa Dsitivibas Laika.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "4. Es darriju leeſus Darbus/
es uhſatſijn man Chkas/ dehſti-
ju man Wihna-Dahrsis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "5. Es fevim darriju Dahrs-
jes un jankus Dahrsis/ un stah-
dijn wiſſadus augligus Rohkus
eekſcha.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
